close_reason: Fixed godeps-gen to use --unpack flag for Go proxy fetches, ensuring hashes match Nix fetchzip behavior

comments.text:
godeps-gen's GoProxyPrefetcher uses nix-prefetch-url (or nix-prefetch-cached) without --unpack flag when fetching from proxy.golang.org. However, the Nix go-deps-cell fetcher uses fetchzip with stripRoot=false, which unpacks the archive.

This mismatch causes hash mismatches when building the godeps-cell. The hash generated by godeps-gen is for the raw zip file, but Nix expects a hash of the unpacked content.

Fix needed in src/go/pkg/godeps/prefetch.go:
- runNixPrefetchURL should use --unpack flag when called from GoProxyPrefetcher
- Or add a new runNixPrefetchZip function that uses --unpack

Related: go.starlark.net hash had to be manually fixed in go-deps.toml
comments.author: Yann Hodique

title: godeps-gen: use --unpack for Go proxy fetches
